description: Quality delta between Claude without the skill vs with the skill loaded

typical_issues: Description written in first person ('I will review...')
Tools list includes write or terminal tools unnecessarily
No non-goals section — agent scope is ambiguous
Completion criteria absent or too vague to enforce

improvements: Third-person description required by workflow step 1
Tool policy explicitly maps to read-only for inspection agents

scenarios.delta_explanation: Without skill, agent definitions are routinely missing non-goals and have first-person descriptions that break discovery.

typical_issues: Produces a single god-agent with all requested capabilities
No delegation boundaries or handoff rules
Agent description is a feature list, not a mission

improvements: God-agent anti-pattern is explicitly named and rejected
Decomposition into specialized agents is proposed
Each sub-agent gets its own bounded tool policy

scenarios.delta_explanation: Monolithic agent creation is a default behavior without skill intervention.

typical_issues: May not detect first-person description problem

improvements: Clarifying questions asked before any rewrite
All missing fields identified and listed explicitly

scenarios.delta_explanation: Skill prevents hallucinated scope by requiring questions before repair.
